title: RPM: Limit Epoch 102 to podman-next copr
body:
Users of WSL images currently get podman from the copr rpm on the release PR with Epoch: 102. This is a problem if the user is looking to update the image with packages from official Fedora repos.

This commit limits Epoch: 102 to only the podman rpms on rhcontainerbot/podman-next copr. All other rpms, including other copr rpms, will use the default Epoch.

comments.body:
rpms built in the [ephemeral copr](https://copr.fedorainfracloud.org/coprs/packit/containers-podman-26303/build/9138886/) have `Epoch: 5` . Also can be seen in the [rawhide copr build log](https://download.copr.fedorainfracloud.org/results/packit/containers-podman-26303/fedora-rawhide-x86_64/09138886-podman/builder-live.log.gz)
